overall.description: A static first-person view from a video game (Hogwarts Legacy) showing a gothic-style common room with a large circular stone fireplace. Bright morning sunlight streams through tall arched diamond-pane windows while a fire burns steadily in the hearth. An NPC in dark robes briefly walks through the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: gothic common room with central hearth

tall arched windows with diamond-patterned leaded glass letting in bright sunlight
tall arched windows with diamond-patterned leaded glass letting in bright sunlight
upholstered high-backed armchair with wooden frame positioned next to the fireplace
small ornate side table beside the armchair holding books or objects

segments.scene_description: A serene indoor scene featuring a grand gothic common room centered around a burning circular stone fireplace. Sunlight streams through tall diamond-pane windows on either side, illuminating the marble floors and ornate rugs. To the right sits a blue velvet armchair with a small wooden side table. At approximately 2 seconds, an NPC in dark robes walks through the left background, briefly crossing the space before exiting. The camera remains stationary throughout, capturing the warm ambient atmosphere of the magical interior.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot presents a serene, stationary view of a grand gothic common room that maintains a warm, ambient atmosphere throughout. It begins by capturing the glow of a burning circular stone fireplace centered within the space, with bright morning sunlight streaming through tall diamond-pane windows to illuminate marble floors and ornate rugs. As the light fills the room, the view encompasses a blue velvet armchair and a small wooden side table positioned to the right. The scene then shifts focus slightly as an NPC in dark robes enters from the left background, crossing the room in a brief moment of movement. Finally, the figure exits the frame, leaving the camera to linger on the quiet, magical interior.
